ocr_findings.description: Illustration elements (Japanese person, Italian person, speech bubble 'Hello') are split into separate img-0/img-1/img-2 image references with caption text extracted separately. The visual metaphor is intact in prose; no semantic loss.

reviewer_notes: Lesson 14-03 chapter-intro page on 通信プロトコル. The page has a substantial explanatory body (4 paragraphs) in addition to the illustration, so 'content' is more appropriate than 'chapter_title'. All prose faithfully captured. The intro illustration is referenced as images without caption loss.
